sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ عُمَرُ افْتِتَاحَ مَطْعَمٍ صَغِيرٍ لِلْأَكَلَاتِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Omar je odlučio otvoriti mali restoran zdrave hrane.
sentences.translationEn: Omar decided to open a small restaurant for healthy food.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعَ خُطَّةً دَقِيقَةً وَبَحَثَ عَنْ مَوْقِعٍ مُمَيَّزٍ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Napravio je precizan plan i tražio istaknuto mjesto u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: He put together a precise plan and looked for a special location in the city.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يَعْمَلُ بِجِدٍّ لِأَنَّهُ يُرِيدُ أَنْ يُصْبِحَ رَائِدَ أَعْمَالٍ مَشْهُورًا.
sentences.translation: On naporno radi jer želi postati poznati preduzetnik.
sentences.translationEn: He works hard because he wants to become a famous entrepreneur.
